channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 iampedii/WhiteDNS (914 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iampedii

📝 Repository: iampedii/WhiteDNS

📄 Descrizione: Source-available Android DNS tunneling client with VPN and proxy modes, backed by MasterDNS & StormDNS.

⭐ Stelle: 914

🍴 Forks: 59

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: vpn vpn-client

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-10T05:27:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-08T04:44:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ianshulyadav/PixelMusic (152 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ianshulyadav

📝 Repository: ianshulyadav/PixelMusic

📄 Descrizione: 🎵 A premium Material 3 Expressive local and yt music client for Android. Enjoy a beautiful, free Spotify and YT Premium alternative with local playback, high-res YouTube Music, and Telegram streaming. Loaded with synchronized LRC lyrics, custom 10-band EQ, gapless playback, Wear OS companion, and Gemini AI playlist helpers.

⭐ Stelle: 152

🍴 Forks: 10

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android expressive glassmorphism m3 m3u material-you material3 material3-android material3-expressive music-player newpipe newpipe-extractor pixel-music pixelmusic pixelplayer spotify-alternative youtube-music yt-dlp yt-music-client yt-music-premium

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-21T15:38:54Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-14T06:17:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
